历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 10405 → 11535 → 12343 → 17775 → 14762, showing an overall backward trend; in 2024, due to Guangxi's first new college entrance examination reform (arts/science division → physics/history category), the ranking significantly dropped to 17775, then rebounded to 14762 in 2025, with large fluctuations in the past two years; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 27 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 64 in 2024, and 90 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 79, a reduction of about 12.2% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 92nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a slight decline from 86th to 92nd in recent years, overall stable. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving a teacher ethics incident (a professor publicly humiliated a student seeking help), which may suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranking is 100th, rated as average, with low short video exposure; Foreign Language and Literature is an A- discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly related to the Foreign Language and Literature category in the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of teacher training/education majors is divided and wait-and-see; computer science, electronic information/communication and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, strongly attracting physics category candidates; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% from about 380,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition; Hunan Normal University is located in Hunan Province, adjacent to Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region, with strong regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi in recent years is about 2%-4%, at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline of 14762, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 12.2% (ranking number decreases by about 1082), the provincial candidate increase of about 3.3%, and the somewhat negative reputation, the reduction benefit and the pressure from increased candidates partially offset each other. It is estimated that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 13880, with a range of 13380–14380.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 湖南师范大学在广西医学类招生，2021年最低位次10405（计划14人），2024年最低位次11949（计划13人），2025年最低位次43675（计划15人）。2021至2024年医学位次稳中有 升，但2025年广西新高考首年，医学类位次大幅下滑至43675，降幅超3.1万名。2026年招生计划缩减至13人（较2025年减少2人，缩招约13.3%），临床医学5人、药学4人、预防医 学4人，康复治疗学退出招生。缩招对位次有上推效应（更难进），但2025年位次基数较高，回调幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学是国家211工程重点建设高校、双一流建设高校，位于湖南省长沙市。学校医学部（咸嘉湖校区）依托综合性大学平台办学，在师范类院校中医学实力稳步提升，临 床医学专业在广西考生中认可度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在广西持续为报考热门方向，临床医学尤其受青睐。2026年湖南师范大学在广西医学类仅保留3个专业（临床医学、药学、预防医学），康复治疗学停招，专业结构精 简。长沙地处中部，距离广西较近，交通便利，对广西考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年位次大幅下滑后的回调趋势，以及2026年缩招2人的供给收紧因素，预计2026年湖南师范大学医学类最低录取位次约为39681名，较2025年回升约3994名（ 更难进）。波动区间预计在39284至40078名之间，建议考生在此区间内合理填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Hunan Normal University's medical enrollment in Guangxi: 2021 minimum rank 10405 (plan 14), 2024 minimum rank 11949 (plan 13), 2025 minimum rank 43675 (plan 15). From 2021 to 2024, medical rankings steadily increased, but in 2025, the first year of Guangxi's new college entrance exam, medical rankings dropped sharply to 43675, a decrease of over 31,000 places. In 2026, the enrollment plan is reduced to 13 (a decrease of 2 from 2025, about 13.3% reduction), with 5 in Clinical Medicine, 4 in Pharmacy, 4 in Preventive Medicine, and Rehabilitation Therapy withdrawn. The reduction pushes rankings upward (harder to enter), but the 2025 ranking base is high, limiting the rebound.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a national 211 Project key university and a Double First-Class construction university, located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. The university's Medical Department (Xianjiahu Campus) operates on a comprehensive university platform, with steadily improving medical strength among normal universities. Clinical Medicine is highly recognized among Guangxi candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors remain a popular choice in Guangxi, with Clinical Medicine particularly favored. In 2026, Hunan Normal University retains only 3 medical majors in Guangxi (Clinical Medicine, Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine), with Rehabilitation Therapy discontinued, streamlining the major structure. Changsha, located in central China, is close to Guangxi with convenient transportation, offering some regional appeal to Guangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend after the sharp drop in the first year of the new college entrance exam in 2025, and the supply tightening due to a reduction of 2 students in 2026, it is predicted that the minimum admission rank for Hunan Normal University's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 39681, an increase of about 3994 places from 2025 (harder to enter). The fluctuation range is expected between 39284 and 40078. Candidates are advised to fill in applications reasonably within this range.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Pharmacy as the main target, aim for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine as a reach, and use Tier 3 Preventive Medicine as a safety.
